NeuroLink API Reference

  • Overview
  • Authentication
  • Endpoints
  • Error Handling

Overview

The NeuroLink API provides a unified interface for AI-powered text generation, embeddings, and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG). All API requests use JSON format and require authentication.

Base URL: https://api.neurolink.ai/v1

Authentication

Authenticate using Bearer tokens in the Authorization header:

Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY

API keys can be generated from your dashboard at dashboard.neurolink.ai.

API Endpoints

Generate Text

POST /generate

Generate text completion using AI models.

Request Body

Parameter Type Required Description
messages array Yes Array of message objects with role and content
model string No Model identifier (default: gpt-4o-mini)
temperature number No Sampling temperature (0-2, default: 0.7)
max_tokens integer No Maximum tokens to generate

Example Request

{
  "messages": [
    {"role": "user", "content": "What is machine learning?"}
  ],
  "model": "gpt-4o-mini",
  "temperature": 0.7
}

Create Embeddings

POST /embed

Generate vector embeddings for text input.

Request Body

Parameter Type Required Description
input string | array Yes Text or array of texts to embed
model string No Embedding model (default: text-embedding-3-small)

RAG Query

POST /rag/query

Query indexed documents with semantic search.

Request Body

Parameter Type Required Description
query string Yes Search query
index_name string Yes Name of the index to search
top_k integer No Number of results (default: 5)
min_score number No Minimum similarity score (0-1)

Error Handling

The API uses standard HTTP status codes:

  • 200 - Success
  • 400 - Bad Request (invalid parameters)
  • 401 - Unauthorized (invalid API key)
  • 429 - Too Many Requests (rate limited)
  • 500 - Internal Server Error

Error Response Format

{
  "error": {
    "code": "invalid_request",
    "message": "The 'messages' parameter is required"
  }
}
